modal.title: Help & Knowledge Base
modal.tryDifferentSearch: Try a different search term or browse categories

platformOverview.title: Platform Overview
platformOverview.description: Learn what ProCrèche Solutions is and how it connects the Swiss childcare ecosystem.
platformOverview.content:
What is ProCrèche Solutions?

ProCrèche Solutions is an all-in-one platform connecting the Swiss childcare ecosystem:

• Daycares (Foundations) - Find products, services, staff, and manage parent enquiries
• Product Suppliers - Sell childcare products to daycares
• Service Providers - Offer professional services to daycares
• Educators - Find job opportunities at daycares
• Parents - Find quality daycare for their children

Supported Languages

The platform is available in three languages:
• English
• Français (French)
• Deutsch (German)

You can change your language at any time using the language switcher in the navigation bar.

createAccount.title: Creating Your Account
createAccount.description: Step-by-step guide to creating a new account on ProCrèche Solutions.
createAccount.content:
Step 1: Go to Sign Up
Click the 'Sign Up' button in the top navigation bar.

Step 2: Choose Your Role
Select the account type that matches your needs:
• 🏫 Foundation - Daycare centers
• 📦 Product Supplier - Companies selling products
• 🔧 Service Provider - Companies offering services
• 👩‍🏫 Educator - Childcare professionals
• 👨‍👩‍👧 Parent - Parents seeking daycare

Step 3: Fill in Your Details
Complete the registration form with your information.

Step 4: Accept Terms & CAPTCHA
Accept the Terms of Service and complete the CAPTCHA verification.

Step 5: Verify Your Email
Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.

Alternative: Sign Up with Google
You can also click 'Continue with Google' for faster registration.

emailVerification.title: Email Verification
emailVerification.description: How to verify your email with the 6-digit verification code.
emailVerification.content:
Verification Process

After creating your account, you'll receive a 6-digit verification code:

1. Check your email inbox (and spam/junk folder)
2. Find the email from ProCrèche Solutions
3. Copy the 6-digit code
4. Enter it in the verification field
5. Click 'Verify Email'

Didn't Receive the Code?
• Wait 30 seconds for the resend option
• Click 'Resend code' to get a new one
• Check your spam/junk folder

Code Expired?
Codes expire after about 10 minutes. Simply click 'Resend code' to get a fresh one.

Tip: Enter the code as soon as you receive it for the best experience.

signIn.title: Signing In
signIn.description: How to log in to your ProCrèche Solutions account.
signIn.content:
Standard Login

1. Go to the login page
2. Enter your email address
3. Enter your password
4. Click 'Sign In'

Login with Google

1. Click 'Continue with Google'
2. Select your Google account
3. You'll be signed in automatically

Stay Signed In
Your session remains active as you navigate. You'll be automatically signed out after inactivity for security.

navigation.title: Navigating the Platform
navigation.description: Learn how to navigate around ProCrèche Solutions using the sidebar and menus.
navigation.content:
Sidebar Navigation

After signing in, the sidebar on the left shows your main navigation options. Menu items vary by role.

Top Navigation Bar
• 🔔 Notifications - Bell icon for alerts
• 🌐 Language - Switch between EN/FR/DE
• 👤 Profile Menu - Click your avatar

Profile Menu Options
• View Profile - See your public profile
• Edit Profile - Update your information
• Settings - Access account settings
• Sign Out - Log out of your account

changePassword.title: Changing Your Password
changePassword.description: How to update your account password for better security.
changePassword.content:
To Change Your Password:

1. Go to Settings → Account Security
2. Find the 'Change Password' section
3. Enter your current password
4. Enter your new password
5. Confirm your new password
6. Click 'Update Password'

Password Requirements:
• At least 8 characters long
• Not a commonly used password
• Not exposed in data breaches

Best Practices:
• Use a unique password
• Don't share with others
• Update regularly

changeEmail.title: Changing Your Email
changeEmail.description: How to update the email address associated with your account.
changeEmail.content:
To Change Your Email:

1. Go to Settings → Account Security
2. Find 'Change Email Address'
3. Enter your new email address
4. Click 'Send Verification Code'
5. Check your NEW email for the code
6. Enter the 6-digit verification code
7. Click 'Verify & Change Email'

Important: You must verify the new email before the change takes effect. Your old email will no longer work for login after the change.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: How to reset your password if you've forgotten it.
forgotPassword.content:
Reset Your Password:

1. On the login page, click 'Forgot Password?'
2. Enter your email address
3. Click 'Send Reset Link'
4. Check your email for the reset link
5. Click the link to open the reset page
6. Enter your new password
7. Confirm your new password
8. Click 'Reset Password'

Note: Reset links expire quickly for security. Request a new one if yours has expired.

profileSetup.title: Setting Up Your Profile
profileSetup.description: How to complete and optimize your profile for the best experience.
profileSetup.content:
Why Complete Your Profile?
• Foundations: Appear in parent searches
• Suppliers/Providers: Get discovered by customers
• Educators: Stand out to employers
• Parents: Get better daycare matches

To Complete Your Profile:

1. Click your profile picture (top right)
2. Select 'Edit Profile'
3. Fill in all sections
4. Upload a profile photo
5. Click 'Save'

foundationDashboard.title: Foundation Dashboard
foundationDashboard.description: Overview of the Foundation (Daycare) dashboard and its features.
foundationDashboard.content:
Dashboard Overview

Your Foundation dashboard shows key statistics and recent activity:

• Active parent leads/enquiries
• Pending orders and appointments
• Staff applications
• Messages and notifications

Key Features:
• Marketplace access for products and services
• Parent lead management
• Recruitment tools
• E-Learning and HR resources
• Analytics and reporting

parentLeads.title: Managing Parent Leads
parentLeads.description: How to view, respond to, and manage parent enquiries.
parentLeads.content:
Parent Leads Overview

Parent leads are enquiries from parents looking for daycare.

Lead Status Types:
• New - Unread enquiries
• In Progress - Being processed
• Contacted - Initial contact made
• Waitlisted - On your waiting list
• Enrolled - Successfully enrolled
• Declined - Declined enquiries

To Respond to a Lead:
1. Click on the lead to view details
2. Review parent information
3. Update the status as needed
4. Send a message via the messaging system

marketplaceOrdering.title: Ordering from the Marketplace
marketplaceOrdering.description: How to browse, order products, and request services.
marketplaceOrdering.content:
Browsing the Marketplace

Access the Marketplace from your sidebar to find:
• Products - Childcare supplies and equipment
• Services - Professional services for daycares

To Order Products:
1. Browse or search for products
2. Click on a product for details
3. Select quantity and options
4. Add to cart
5. Review cart and checkout
6. Complete your order

To Request Services:
1. Browse service providers
2. View service details
3. Click 'Request Service'
4. Fill in the request form
5. Submit your request

recruitmentJobs.title: Recruitment & Job Posting
recruitmentJobs.description: How to post jobs and manage candidates as a Foundation.
recruitmentJobs.content:
Posting a Job

1. Go to Recruitment → Job Listings
2. Click 'Create Job Posting'
3. Fill in job details
4. Set requirements and qualifications
5. Publish the listing

Managing Candidates
• View applications from educators
• Review candidate profiles
• Schedule interviews
• Send messages to candidates
• Update application status

Candidate Pool
Browse the candidate pool to find educators actively seeking positions.

supplierDashboard.title: Supplier Dashboard
supplierDashboard.description: Overview of the Product Supplier dashboard and key metrics.
supplierDashboard.content:
Dashboard Overview

Your Supplier dashboard shows:
• Active product listings
• Recent orders
• Pending inquiries
• Performance metrics

Key Actions:
• Add new products
• Manage orders
• Respond to inquiries
• View analytics
• Update business profile

productListings.title: Managing Product Listings
productListings.description: How to add, edit, and manage your product catalog.
productListings.content:
Quick navigation (from your organization profile)

1. Open your Organization Profile
2. Click Edit Profile
3. Click My Products (next to Save Changes)
4. You’ll land on Product Listings

Adding a New Product

1. Click Add Product / Create Product
2. Complete the form (recommended order):
• Basics: Product name (required), subtitle (optional), description (required)
• Categories: primary category + additional categories (optional) + tags (optional)
• Pricing & availability: price/currency, availability status (draft/active/out of stock), visibility
• Inventory: stock status, SKU/vendor SKU/EAN, min/max order quantity (as needed)
• Media & documents: product image (recommended), optional gallery/spec sheet/MSDS
3. Click Save to publish/update your listing

Editing Products
Open any product from your list to edit details, update pricing, or change visibility.

supplierOrders.title: Managing Orders
supplierOrders.description: How to view, process, and fulfill orders as a supplier.
supplierOrders.content:
Order Management

1. Go to Orders from the sidebar
2. View incoming orders
3. Update order status:
• Pending → Processing
• Processing → Shipped
• Shipped → Delivered

Order Details
Click on an order to see:
• Customer information
• Product details
• Shipping address
• Order notes

Communication
Use the messaging system to contact customers about their orders.

promoCodes.title: Promo Codes
promoCodes.description: How to create and manage promotional discount codes.
promoCodes.content:
Creating a Promo Code

1. Go to Settings → Promo Code Manager
2. Click 'Add Promo Code'
3. Fill in the details:

Promo Code Fields:
• Code - The code customers enter (e.g., SAVE20)
• Discount Description - What discount they receive (e.g., '20% off all orders')
• Description (optional) - Terms or conditions
• Active - Toggle to enable/disable

4. Click 'Save Promo Code'

Managing Codes
• Edit codes to update details
• Toggle active status on/off
• Delete codes no longer needed

serviceProviderDashboard.title: Service Provider Dashboard
serviceProviderDashboard.description: Overview of the Service Provider dashboard and features.
serviceProviderDashboard.content:
Dashboard Overview

Your Service Provider dashboard shows:
• Active service listings
• Incoming service requests
• Upcoming appointments
• Performance metrics

Key Features:
• Manage service offerings
• Respond to requests
• External booking integration
• Analytics and reporting

serviceListings.title: Managing Service Listings
serviceListings.description: How to add and manage your service offerings.
serviceListings.content:
Quick navigation (from your organization profile)

1. Open your Organization Profile
2. Click Edit Profile
3. Click My Services (next to Save Changes)
4. You’ll land on Service Listings

Adding a New Service

1. Click Add New Service
2. Complete the form:
• Service title (required)
• Description (required)
• Service categories (required) – select suggestions or type your own and press Enter
• Delivery type (recommended) – On-site / Remote / Hybrid
• Availability (required) – e.g., “Weekdays 9:00–18:00” or “By appointment”
• Pricing details (optional) – e.g., “CHF 150/hour”
• Tags (optional) – comma-separated keywords
• Service image (optional) – upload a JPG/PNG for the marketplace card
3. Click Add (or Save Changes when editing) to publish/update the service

Service Visibility
If you need to temporarily hide a service, edit it and adjust its visibility/status from your listings view.

serviceRequests.title: Handling Service Requests
serviceRequests.description: How to view and respond to service requests from daycares.
serviceRequests.content:
Service Requests

When a daycare requests your service:

1. You'll receive a notification
2. Go to 'My Requests'
3. Review the request details
4. Respond with availability
5. Update request status

Request Statuses:
• New - Unread request
• In Progress - Being handled
• Scheduled - Appointment set
• Completed - Service delivered
• Cancelled - Request cancelled

bookingLink.title: Booking Link Integration
bookingLink.description: How to set up an external booking link (Calendly, etc.).
bookingLink.content:
Adding a Booking Link

You can add an external booking link to let daycares schedule directly:

1. Go to Settings → Contact & Booking
2. Find 'Booking Link' section
3. Enter your booking URL (e.g., Calendly)
4. Save your settings

How it Works:
• Your booking link appears on your profile
• Daycares can click to schedule directly
• Supports Calendly, Acuity, and other booking tools

educatorProfile.title: Educator Profile
educatorProfile.description: How to set up and optimize your educator profile.
educatorProfile.content:
Profile Sections:

• Basic Info - Name, photo, contact
• Qualifications - Education, certifications
• Experience - Work history
• Availability - When you can work
• Documents - CV, certificates

Tips for Success:
• Upload a professional photo
• List all relevant qualifications
• Keep availability up to date
• Write a compelling bio

jobBoard.title: Job Board
jobBoard.description: How to search and apply for jobs as an educator.
jobBoard.content:
Finding Jobs

1. Go to Job Board from sidebar
2. Use filters to narrow results:
• Location/Canton
• Job type (full-time, part-time)
• Experience level
3. Click on a job for details

Applying for Jobs

1. Review job requirements
2. Click 'Apply'
3. Submit your application
4. Track status in 'My Applications'

availabilitySettings.title: Availability Settings
availabilitySettings.description: How to set your weekly availability and date overrides.
availabilitySettings.content:
Weekly Availability

Set your regular weekly schedule:
1. Go to Profile → Availability
2. Enable/disable each day
3. Set start and end times
4. Save changes

Date Overrides

For specific dates with different availability:
1. Click 'Add Date Override'
2. Select the date
3. Mark as unavailable or set custom hours
4. Add a reason (optional)
5. Save the override

findDaycare.title: Finding Daycare
findDaycare.description: How to search for and browse daycare options.
findDaycare.content:
Browse Foundations

1. Go to 'Browse Foundations'
2. Use filters:
• Location/Canton
• Languages supported
• Availability
3. View daycare profiles
4. Check services and capacity

What to Look For:
• Location convenience
• Opening hours
• Language support
• Available spots
• Photos and reviews

submitInquiry.title: Submitting an Inquiry
submitInquiry.description: How to submit a daycare inquiry as a parent.
submitInquiry.content:
Submit Your Inquiry

1. Go to 'Find a Crèche'
2. Fill in the form:
• Child's information
• Preferred start date
• Care schedule needed
• Preferred locations
• Additional requirements
3. Submit your inquiry

What Happens Next:
• Daycares receive your inquiry
• They'll respond via the platform
• Track responses in 'My Enquiries'

trackInquiries.title: Tracking Your Inquiries
trackInquiries.description: How to view and track your daycare inquiry status.
trackInquiries.content:
View Your Inquiries

1. Go to 'My Enquiries' from sidebar
2. See all submitted inquiries
3. Check status of each:
• Pending - Awaiting response
• Responded - Daycare replied
• Waitlisted - On waiting list
• Enrolled - Spot confirmed

Communication
Use the messaging system to communicate with daycares about your inquiry.

accountSecurity.title: Account Security Settings
accountSecurity.description: How to manage your account security and authentication.
accountSecurity.content:
Security Settings

Go to Settings → Account Security to manage:

• Change Password - Update your password
• Change Email - Update your email address
• Connected Accounts - Manage Google login

Best Practices:
• Use a strong, unique password
• Keep email address current
• Sign out on shared devices

notificationSettings.title: Notification Settings
notificationSettings.description: How to manage your email and platform notifications.
notificationSettings.content:
Notification Preferences

Go to Settings → Notifications to manage:

• Email Notifications
- Order updates
- New messages
- Lead notifications
- Marketing emails

• Platform Notifications
- In-app alerts
- Bell icon notifications

Toggle each type on/off based on your preferences.

privacySettings.title: Privacy & Data Settings
privacySettings.description: How to manage your privacy settings and data.
privacySettings.content:
Privacy Options

Go to Settings → Privacy & Data:

• Profile Visibility - Control what's public
• Data Export - Download your data
• Account Deletion - Request account deletion

GDPR Rights:
• Access your personal data
• Request data correction
• Request data deletion
• Data portability

languageSettings.title: Language Settings
languageSettings.description: How to change the platform language.
languageSettings.content:
Changing Language

The platform supports three languages:
• 🇬🇧 English
• 🇫🇷 Français (French)
• 🇩🇪 Deutsch (German)

To Change Language:
1. Click the language switcher in the top navigation
2. Select your preferred language
3. The platform updates immediately

Your language preference is saved automatically.

subscriptionPlans.title: Subscription Plans
subscriptionPlans.description: Overview of available subscription plans and pricing.
subscriptionPlans.content:
Available Plans

Foundation Plans:
• Starter - Basic features
• Professional - Full features
• Enterprise - Custom solutions

Supplier/Provider Plans:
• Contact us for custom pricing

Billing Options:
• Monthly billing
• Annual billing (save up to 20%)

manageSubscription.title: Managing Your Subscription
manageSubscription.description: How to view, upgrade, or cancel your subscription.
manageSubscription.content:
Subscription Management

Go to Settings → Billing & Subscription:

• View Current Plan - See your active subscription
• Upgrade Plan - Move to a higher tier
• Change Billing - Monthly ↔ Annual
• Cancel Subscription - End your subscription

To Request Changes:
1. Click 'Manage Subscription'
2. Select your desired action
3. Complete the request form
4. Our team will process it

invoices.title: Invoices & Payment History
invoices.description: How to view and download your invoices.
invoices.content:
Viewing Invoices

Go to Settings → Billing & Subscription:

• View all past invoices
• Download PDF invoices
• See payment status

Invoice Details Include:
• Invoice number and date
• Service period
• Amount and taxes
• Payment status

loginIssues.title: Login Issues
loginIssues.content:
Can't Log In?

Check These:
• Email address is correct
• Password is correct (check caps lock)
• Account is verified

Solutions:
• Use 'Forgot Password' to reset
• Try Google login if available
• Clear browser cache and cookies
• Try a different browser

Account Locked?
Contact support if you're locked out after multiple attempts.

verificationIssues.title: Verification Issues
verificationIssues.content:
Verification Code Not Received?

1. Check spam/junk folder
2. Wait 30 seconds, click 'Resend code'
3. Check email address is correct
4. Add our email to contacts

Code Expired?
Codes expire after ~10 minutes. Click 'Resend code' for a new one.

Code Not Working?
• Enter exactly 6 digits
• No spaces
• Use the most recent code

browserCompatibility.title: Browser Compatibility
browserCompatibility.content:
Supported Browsers:

• Google Chrome (recommended)
• Mozilla Firefox
• Microsoft Edge
• Safari

Requirements:
• Keep browser updated
• Enable JavaScript
• Enable cookies

Issues?
• Clear cache and cookies
• Disable browser extensions
• Try incognito/private mode

contactSupport.title: Contact Support
contactSupport.description: How to get help from our support team.
contactSupport.content:
Ways to Get Help:

1. Support Page
Go to Support from your sidebar to:
• Browse FAQs
• Submit a support ticket
• View ticket history

2. Email Support
support@procrechesolutions.com

When Contacting Support:
• Describe your issue clearly
• Include any error messages
• Mention your browser/device
• Attach screenshots if helpful
